info.title: apra-fleet hub <-> dashboard API
info.description: Contract for fleet.apralabs.com. JWTClaims (the ws/workspace_id claim) is the anchor schema -- every workspace-scoped route is gated behind it.

bearerAuth.description: Workspace-scoped member JWT; claims validated against JWTClaims.

iss.description: Issuer -- hub URL, or "local" in Phase-1 offline mode

role.description: Requesting user's role within this workspace

folder.description: Work folder on the member machine

status.description: Last-known, pushed over SSE -- never implies live polling

lastPrompt.description: Real, sourced last prompt -- never fabricated

lastPrompt.description: Real, sourced last prompt -- never fabricated

window.description: 7d/30d are disabled until a persisted ledger exists

provider.description: OAuth provider (google/microsoft), not the LLM provider

workspaces.description: workspace_ids this user is assigned to
